threads._description: Thread 1: Complete fix — TF error with fix reply

root.text:
Getting error on terraform apply: ```Error: creating Security Group (sg-12345): InvalidGroup.Duplicate: The security group 'web-sg' already exists for VPC 'vpc-abc123'```
Anyone seen this before?

replies.text:
Yeah, check if someone created it manually in the console. You'll need to import it:
```terraform import aws_security_group.web sg-12345```

threads._description: Thread 2: Multiple resolution replies — two steps

root.text: Our aws_s3_bucket replication is failing with AccessDenied. The IAM role looks correct but cross-account access isn't working.

replies.text: First we need to add the bucket policy on the destination account to allow the source role.
Also make sure the KMS key policy in the destination allows the source role to decrypt. That was our issue last time.
Both steps fixed it, thanks team!

threads._description: Thread 3: Self-solved — same author on root and fix

root.text: Terraform plan keeps showing changes to aws_lambda_function even though nothing changed in code. Phantom diffs on the runtime attribute.

replies.text: Figured it out. AWS deprecated python3.8, so the provider is normalizing it to python3.9. Need to update our variable default and add a lifecycle ignore_changes block.

threads._description: Thread 4: Issue only, no resolution marker — should be skipped

root.text: Anyone else seeing 503s from the ALB after the latest deploy? Health checks are passing but real traffic is failing.

replies.text: Might be the target group draining settings?

threads._description: Thread 5: K8s fix — tests resource detection

root.text:
Pod keeps crashing with OOMKilled: ```kubectl get pods
NAME                     READY   STATUS      RESTARTS
api-server-7d4f8-x2k    0/1     OOMKilled   5```
kubernetes resource limits seem too low.

replies.text: Increase the memory limit in the deployment manifest. We had to bump from 256Mi to 512Mi for that service. Also check if there's a memory leak with `kubectl top pods`.

threads._description: Thread 6: Mrkdwn formatting — mentions, links, bold

root.text: <@U002> can you look at this? *Critical*: the _terraform_ state in <https://console.aws.amazon.com/s3|AWS Console> shows drift on <#C9999999|infra-alerts>

replies.text: Run `terraform refresh` then `terraform plan` to reconcile. The drift was from a manual change in the console. See <https://docs.example.com/runbook|the runbook> for the full process.

threads._description: Thread 7: Code blocks in both root and resolution

root.text:
Getting this error when trying to create an IAM role:
```Error: creating IAM Role (deploy-role): MalformedPolicyDocument: Has prohibited field Resource
  Status code: 400```
The assume_role_policy looks wrong.
